name: Salmon or Tuna Fish Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Shredded red salmon or tuna, fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in cold water.
2. Add hot boiling water and stir until dissolved.
3. Cool mixture until partially set.
4. Add salmon, celery, cabbage, sweet pickle, salt, lemon juice, and vinegar to the gelatin mixture.
5. Mix lightly with 2 forks.
6. Pour into a mold.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Serve on crisp lettuce.
9. Serve with mayonnaise.
10. Garnish with paprika.
Serves 8
